testcase.classname: Campaigns Tests TC_CAMP_003: filter tab buttons present (count > 0)

testcase.classname: Campaigns Tests TC_CAMP_005: clicking campaign card changes URL away from /campaigns

testcase.name: Dashboard Tests TC_DASH_004: h1 or h2 visible
